content.full_text:
Memorandum

Advice No. M-83-055

March 2, 1983

TO: Advice Request Meeting Participants

FROM: Alice Hughes

In 1980, the staff decided that the repayment of a loan by a family member to a public official should be reported as income by the official. At that time, a recommendation was made to amend Section 82030 to exclude this type of transaction. Since no change has been made, should we consider altering our informal advice?

AH:km

March 10, 1983

3/3/83 meeting:

Agreed that our advice should be that all loan transactions among family members, including repayment, should not be reportable. Also agreed that Bob Stern should try to include this in this year's amendments to the Act.
